features.title: Apartment west curb pickup
features.notes: Use the side street curb after 6 PM. Main frontage blocks the bus lane and causes missed pickups.

features.title: Office tower north dropoff
features.notes: Safer passenger exit than the front entrance during morning traffic. Clear curb cut and enough staging room.

features.title: Viaduct construction closure
features.notes: Temporary closure through the viaduct from 7 AM to 5 PM. Should reroute pickups to the river side frontage road.

features.title: Faded lane markings at grocery turn
features.notes: Left turn pocket is hard to read at night and after rain. Mark for caution and possible future camera review.

features.title: 15-minute curb parking by train stop
features.notes: Useful staging space for short pickups. Usually open outside of baseball game traffic.

activity.message: Faded lane markings at grocery turn added as a draft hazard note.
Viaduct construction closure moved into review after roadwork was spotted on the morning commute.
Office tower north dropoff approved for the next publish.
Apartment west curb pickup published to the personal fleet map.
